body:
For a **full garage door replacement in Pleasanton, California** , a reasonable expectation is:

  * **Typical average:** **$1,800–$3,500** installed for a standard two-car steel garage door.

  * **Budget options:** Around **$1,200–$1,800** for a basic, non-insulated steel door.

  * **Premium doors:** **$3,500–$6,000+** for insulated, wood-look, custom, or glass doors with upgraded hardware. [How Much Does Garage Door Replacement Cost? [2025 Data]](https://www.homeadvisor.com/cost/garages/install-a-garage-door/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)[How Much Does Garage Door Replacement Cost? (2026)](https://homeguide.com/costs/garage-door-installation-cost?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

Pleasanton tends to be on the higher end of national pricing because of Bay Area labor rates. Local estimates indicate:

  * **Labor alone:** roughly **$500–$1,000**.

  * A **16-foot double aluminum door** installed can range from about **$4,400–$6,100** , while premium wood doors can cost considerably more. [How Much Does Garage Door Replacement Cost? [2025 Data]](https://www.homeadvisor.com/cost/garages/install-a-garage-door/?utm_source=chatgpt.com)

If you're gathering quotes, some well-reviewed local installers include:

  * The Door Doctor

  * Boulevard Garage Doors, LLC

  * Precision Garage Door Service

  * Bay To Bay Garage Doors

A good quote should specify:

  * Door brand and model

  * Insulation rating (R-value)

  * New tracks, springs, rollers, and weather seal

  * Whether the existing opener will be reused or replaced

  * Disposal of the old door

  * Warranty on both the door and labor

If you can tell me:

  * whether it's a **single-car (8–9 ft)** or **double-car (16 ft)** door,

  * the material you want (steel, faux wood, wood, glass, etc.),

  * and whether you need a **new opener** ,

I can estimate a more accurate price range for your specific project.  

Give feedback
